comment: W13-B (2026-05-15) — performance budget enforced in CI.
Thresholds match Core Web Vitals 'Good' bucket. CI fails any PR that
regresses ANY page beyond these numbers. To adjust, update this file
and link the rationale (e.g. a perf doc) in the PR body.
Bundle thresholds reference Next.js 'First Load JS' from `next build`
(NOT the audit's transfer total which includes async chunks).
INP is currently measured as 'inp_proxy_ms' — an upper bound derived
from the worst LoAF or event duration observed during a synthetic
scroll+click interaction. The real user INP via web-vitals.js is
always <= this value; we keep the slack so the budget is conservative.

exemptions.comment: Per-route overrides for legitimate slack — must justify each.

/universality/[class_id].reason: Dynamic import of UniversalityAnalogueMap adds a waterfall hop on slow 4G. The bundle savings (~30 KB gz) outweigh the ~100 ms LCP delta.
